name: Search Engine Reveal
description: A sleek, dark-mode search engine UI that types out a query and reveals search results with a knowledge panel.

fields.SEARCH_QUERY: The text typed into the search bar
fields.RESULT_1_TITLE: Title of the first search result
fields.RESULT_1_URL: URL shown for the first result
fields.RESULT_1_DESC: Snippet text for the first result
fields.KNOWLEDGE_TITLE: Title for the side knowledge panel
